MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ryutaro Hirota (via court call) for Kumiko Brunet.

Mr. Hirota reported that there were some delays and that all documents have been submitted to the probate referee. The Court stated that Mr. Hirota needs to respond to the examiner's notes dated 7/1/15. Mr. Hirota stated that a response was filed one week ago and that he would follow up on that. The accounting petition was continued to September 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
